nodes.name: Dusky-tailed flatbill
nodes.summary: Dusky-tailed flatbill（Dusky-tailed flatbill，学名 Ramphotrigon fuscicauda），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 秘鲁

nodes.name: 弗兰克·M·查普曼

nodes.name: 阿克里州
nodes.summary: 阿克里州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括翘嘴蜂鸟、角蜂鸟、Rufous-headed woodpecker等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The dusky-tailed flatbill (Ramphotrigon fuscicauda) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | title =The Birds of Ecuador: Field Guide | publisher =Cornell University Press | volume = II| date =2001 | location =Ithaca | page =487 | isbn =978-0-8014-8721-7 }} Its principal range encompasses southeastern Peru, northwestern Bolivia, and extreme western Brazil's Acre state. There are also scattered records further east in Brazil. The dusky-tailed flatbill inhabits humid evergreen forest where it primarily is found in thickets of bamboo, especially that of genus Guadua

links.label: 分布于

There are also scattered records further east in Brazil. The dusky-tailed flatbill inhabits humid evergreen forest where it primarily is found in thickets of bamboo, especially that of genus Guadua

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon and local in Colombia, very rare and local in Ecuador, and uncommon in Peru and Brazil. "Human activity has little direct effect on Dusky-tailed Flatbill, other than the local effects of habitat destruction."
